languages.text: [Гневно шлепнуть по воде] "Нет у тебя сердца! Нельзя сводить все лишь к плоти и химии".
[Slap the water angrily] "You have no heart! You can't reduce everything to just flesh and chemistry."
languages.original_text: [Гневно шлепнуть по воде] "Нет у тебя сердца! Нельзя сводить все лишь к плоти и химии".

traits.locale_text: [Slap the water angrily] "You have no heart! You can't reduce everything to just flesh and chemistry."
[Slap the water angrily] "You have no heart! You can't reduce everything to just flesh and chemistry."
[Slap the water angrily] "You have no heart! You can't reduce everything to just flesh and chemistry."

languages.text: [Dar un manotazo furioso en el agua] «¡No tiene corazón! No todo se puede reducir a carne y química».
languages.original_text: [Slap the water angrily] "You have no heart! You can't reduce everything to just flesh and chemistry."

traits.locale_text: [Dar un manotazo furioso en el agua] «¡No tiene corazón! No todo se puede reducir a carne y química».

languages.text: 【愤怒地拍打水面】“你这没心没肺的家伙！你不能把什么事都简化成血肉和化学反应。”
languages.original_text: [Slap the water angrily] "You have no heart! You can't reduce everything to just flesh and chemistry."

traits.locale_text: 【愤怒地拍打水面】“你这没心没肺的家伙！你不能把什么事都简化成血肉和化学反应。”

languages.text: [Frapper l'eau d'un geste furieux] « Vous n'avez pas de cœur ! Tout ne peut pas être réduit à la chair et à la chimie. »
languages.original_text: [Slap the water angrily] "You have no heart! You can't reduce everything to just flesh and chemistry."

traits.locale_text: [Frapper l'eau d'un geste furieux] « Vous n'avez pas de cœur ! Tout ne peut pas être réduit à la chair et à la chimie. »

languages.text: [Öfkeyle suya vur] "Çok kalpsizsin! Her şeyi sadece ete ve kimyaya indirgeyemezsin."
languages.original_text: [Slap the water angrily] "You have no heart! You can't reduce everything to just flesh and chemistry."

traits.locale_text: [Öfkeyle suya vur] "Çok kalpsizsin! Her şeyi sadece ete ve kimyaya indirgeyemezsin."

languages.text: ［怒って水面を叩く］「君には心がない！ 何もかもを肉体と化学反応だけに還元することはできないんだ」
languages.original_text: [Slap the water angrily] "You have no heart! You can't reduce everything to just flesh and chemistry."

traits.locale_text: ［怒って水面を叩く］「君には心がない！ 何もかもを肉体と化学反応だけに還元することはできないんだ」

languages.text: [Das Wasser wütend wegschlagen] "Ihr habt kein Herz! Ihr könnt nicht alles nur auf Fleisch und Chemie reduzieren."
languages.original_text: [Slap the water angrily] "You have no heart! You can't reduce everything to just flesh and chemistry."

traits.locale_text: [Das Wasser wütend wegschlagen] "Ihr habt kein Herz! Ihr könnt nicht alles nur auf Fleisch und Chemie reduzieren."
